list.vod_content: Amazon appears to be moving forward with additional seasons of Beast Games. Deadline understands that the streamer is casting for Season 2 and, though there hasn’t been an official renewal announcement, we hear there’s talk of a two-season order for the MrBeast-fronted series. Head of Prime Video and Amazon MGM Studios Mike Hopkins seemed to confirm that Wednesday during a panel at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Los Angeles.

list.vod_sub: 千錘百鍊(台) / Desafio Sob Fogo(巴西) / Forged in Fire - Wettkampf der Schmiede(德) / Forged in Fire - Wettkampf der Waffenschmiede(德) / Il Fuoco Di Spade(意) / Между молотом и наковальней(俄)/Forged in Fire Season 9
list.vod_content: Forged in Fire is a competition show pitting master weapon makers against each other. Each week, four of the best blade smiths in the country will come together to put both their skills and reputations on the line. S9 E1 - Crushed Car Challenge S9 E2 - Blackout S9 E3 - The Ninja's Sword S9 E4 - Sheet Metal Challenge S9 E5 - Blades Gone Wild S9 E6 - Double Trouble Blades S9 E7 -...
